nodes.title: OpenSpec: worktree-branch-mismatch-warning
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning. Adds MismatchChips component to TaskDetailPanel to surface branch/worktree label mismatches as amber warning chips.

nodes.title: 1.1: Create MismatchChips.tsx component scaffold
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §1.1. Create `src/components/task-detail/MismatchChips.tsx` exporting a `MismatchChips({ labels }: { labels: string[] })` React component.

nodes.title: 1.2: Call useWorkspaceContext and compute mismatch booleans
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §1.2. Inside the component, call `useWorkspaceContext()` and compute two booleans (`branchMismatch`, `worktreeMismatch`) using the first-colon-split parser described in design.md §3. Skip computation and return `null` early when `workspaceContext === null`.

nodes.title: 1.3: Render flex row with chips per active mismatch
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §1.3. Render a single flex row containing one chip per active mismatch. Return `null` when neither axis mismatches (no DOM, no layout shift).

nodes.title: 1.4: Style chips with warning/amber tokens from LABEL_CHIP_COLORS
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §1.4. Style each chip with the warning/amber tokens consistent with `LABEL_CHIP_COLORS` in `src/components/task-list/TaskListItem.tsx`. Do not introduce new palette tokens.

nodes.title: 1.5: Add title= and aria-label attributes per chip
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §1.5. Add a `title=` attribute and an `aria-label` per chip with the tooltip copy from design.md §5.

nodes.title: 2.1: Import and render MismatchChips in TaskDetailPanel
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §2.1. In `src/components/task-detail/TaskDetailPanel.tsx`, import `MismatchChips` and render `<MismatchChips labels={task.labels ?? []} />` between the title row and the status/priority row.

nodes.title: 2.2: Confirm no other panel sections require changes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §2.2. Confirm no other panel sections require changes (OpenSpec, Ruflo memory, Git history panels are below the tabs and unaffected).

nodes.title: 3.1: Add MismatchChips.test.tsx covering all axis scenarios
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §3.1. Add `src/components/task-detail/MismatchChips.test.tsx` covering, for each axis independently: (a) match → no chip rendered; (b) mismatch → chip rendered with expected text and aria-label; (c) issue lacks the axis label → no chip; (d) workspace context is null → no chip; (e) both axes mismatch → two chips rendered.

nodes.title: 3.2: Verify chip text format matches documented pattern
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §3.2. Verify chip text format matches `${axis}: <issue-value> (current: <workspace-value>)` exactly.

nodes.title: 3.3: Verify null return when nothing should render
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §3.3. Verify the component returns `null` (i.e. no DOM) when nothing should render — assert via `container.firstChild === null`.

nodes.title: 4.2: bun run test:unit includes new test file and passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §4.2. `bun run test:unit` includes the new test file and passes.

nodes.title: 4.4: Manual — verify branch chip only with mismatched branch label
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §4.4. Manual: with a project on `feat/y`, open an issue carrying `branch:feat/x` and `worktree:feat-y` labels; confirm only the branch chip appears with the documented copy. Repeat reversed.

nodes.title: 4.5: Manual — verify zero chips with matching labels
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §4.5. Manual: open an issue with matching labels; confirm zero chips and no extra row in the DOM.

nodes.title: 4.6: Manual — verify zero chips in non-git project
nodes.description: openspec/changes/worktree-branch-mismatch-warning/tasks.md §4.6. Manual: open a non-git project; confirm zero chips regardless of label content.
